neighborhoods.name: Oceanfront / Resort Area
neighborhoods.description: Famous boardwalk with Atlantic oceanfront, restaurants, entertainment venues, and King Neptune statue
neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Virginia Beach. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Virginia Beach

neighborhoods.name: Great Neck / Shore Drive
neighborhoods.description: Chesapeake Bay side with calmer waters, First Landing State Park, and established neighborhoods
neighborhoods.character: Bay side, state park, established residential
neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Virginia Beach's center and services.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Virginia Beach

neighborhoods.name: Kempsville / Indian River
neighborhoods.description: Central residential areas with affordable housing, community parks, and good school access
neighborhoods.character: Central residential, affordable, parks and schools
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Virginia Beach

neighborhoods.name: Princess Anne / Nimmo
neighborhoods.description: Southern agricultural heritage area with newer development, equestrian farms, and family estates

housing.predominantType: Newer homes, farm properties, and planned communities

neighborhoods.character_notes: Family-friendly area with good schools, parks, and community amenities. Popular with active retirees and families.

sources.title: Numbeo Cost of Living Virginia Beach
